title: Data Licensing
description: Legal instrument granting rights to use protected data, where open data requires an explicitly applied license conforming to the Open Definition.

definitions.definition: Legal instrument granting rights to use protected data, where open data requires an explicitly applied license conforming to the Open Definition.

- [opendatahandbook.org](https://opendatahandbook.org/)
- NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
